> TS workflow residual from the pinned `PaulRBerg/agent-skills` HEAD already used for `cli-just`.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add PaulRBerg/agent-skills@d3f5540ed2fc0fa07f802bd925e06b9387cbe90f --skill vitest --skill commit --skill code-review -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

**Use:** `/vitest`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from curated config (`docs/src/authoring/skills/vitest.mdx`) and local inventory when installed.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add PaulRBerg/agent-skills@d3f5540ed2fc0fa07f802bd925e06b9387cbe90f --skill vitest --skill commit --skill code-review -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Curated** (`curated-trust-gated`)

Curated status: `install-now-after-trust-gate`

Risk notes: TS workflow residual from the pinned `PaulRBerg/agent-skills` HEAD already used for `cli-just`.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

Vitest unit testing framework (Vite-powered). Generated from vitest-dev/vitest official docs. Guidance on testing patterns, config, running suites in Vite-based projects. Complements vite and antfu opinionated preferences.

## Install Prerequisites

`npx skills add antfu/skills --skill vitest -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode`. status=install-now-after-trust-gate; selector=named (or source-spec for some).

## Upstream Maintainer

antfu (Anthony Fu, github.com/antfu/skills). 5.3k stars. MIT (skills/scripts); vendored retain upstream licenses. Proof-of-concept using git submodules + sync from official docs (vuejs, vitejs, vitest-dev, slidevjs etc.) for reliable/up-to-date context. Primarily Vite/Nuxt ecosystem focus. POC; author welcomes feedback on real-world performance.

## Comparable Alternatives

Other test skills (e.g. from PaulRBerg or general); pnpm/vite in same collection.

&gt; Web-augmented research; evidence only, not authority. Config in external-skills.md is authoritative for install.
